description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, black front touchscreen display framed by a slim metallic bezel. The front features a physical home button at the bottom and a front-facing camera, earpiece, and sensors at the top. The back is finished in a metallic gold color, with a rectangular camera module and flash located near the top left, and the brand name 'SAMSUNG' centered below. The sides are thin and metallic, with subtle curvature for ergonomic grip, and likely house physical buttons for power and volume. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, with a glossy finish and premium materials. The device is compact and lightweight, suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, gold and black smartphone with a large touchscreen, metallic frame, and rear camera module. The design is modern, slim, and premium.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black touchscreen, home button, and top sensors/camera.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slim metallic edge and slight curvature.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the gold finish, centered 'SAMSUNG' logo, and rectangular camera module with flash.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the thin metallic edge.
attribute_brand_logo: Centered on the back, 'SAMSUNG' text in a metallic finish.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a stylized wallpaper with diagonal yellow-to-orange gradient lines on a black background; no icons or interface elements are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: One rear camera module with flash, located near the top left on the back; one front-facing camera above the screen.
attribute_button_layout: One physical home button below the screen, and likely power and volume buttons on the sides (not fully visible in all views).
